overall.description: A first-person perspective walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk waterfront promenade during golden hour sunset. The player character moves from under a concrete overpass through a bustling plaza with distinctive tiered architecture and palm trees, walks along the water's edge observing the sunset over the ocean, then turns back through the urban environment passing pedestrians and a large billboard advertisement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from the shadow of an urban overpass into a wide, sun-drenched cyberpunk waterfront promenade. It begins by emerging from beneath a concrete structure, where the view suddenly opens up to reveal towering futuristic buildings and palm trees set against a sunset sky. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts into a bustling pedestrian plaza characterized by outdoor cafe seating and a massive, tiered architectural complex on the left. The gaze then tilts upward to take in the geometric layers of the stacked building against the blue sky before returning to the path. Finally, the camera glides along the water's edge, moving directly toward the setting sun as it casts long shadows and reflects off the ocean surface toward a distant city skyline.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that pivots away from the waterfront to traverse a bustling urban plaza during a golden sunset. It begins by turning back from the water's edge, passing a photographer capturing images of a woman in a red dress as the city's architecture closes in. As the camera advances, the view opens up to reveal a towering Cirrus Cola billboard that dominates the skyline. The scene then shifts toward the heart of the plaza, gliding past the massive advertisement while modern buildings line the right side and the setting sun casts a warm glow from the left.
